allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Mode; "---"; "Ollama installed: " + [bool]\(Get-Command ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "Node installed: " + \(node --version 2>$null\); "Bun: " + \(bun --version 2>$null\); "Rust: " + \(rustc --version 2>$null\))

PowerShell("--- contents of models dir ---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.lmstudio\\models" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; "--- settings.json \(model path\) ---"; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.lmstudio\\settings.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- all drives ---"; Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Select-Object Name, @{n='FreeGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}}, @{n='UsedGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem node_modules/electron -Force | Select-Object Name; "--- dist? ---"; Test-Path node_modules/electron/dist; "--- npm config ---"; npm config get registry; "--- env proxies ---"; $env:HTTP_PROXY; $env:HTTPS_PROXY; "--- cache dir ---"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\electron\\Cache")

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($procs\){ "Electron rodando: " + $procs.Count + " processos" } else { "Electron NAO esta rodando" }; "--- tail log ---"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\joaof\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-joaof-OneDrive-Desktop-TaylorMind\\c61a1a3e-e9d6-4cbb-909c-2427278244c1\\tasks\\bk4epadd7.output" -Tail 8)

PowerShell($ws = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $desktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\); $sc = $ws.CreateShortcut\("$desktop\\TaylorMind.lnk"\); $sc.TargetPath = \(Resolve-Path "release\\win-unpacked\\TaylorMind.exe"\).Path; $sc.WorkingDirectory = \(Resolve-Path "release\\win-unpacked"\).Path; $sc.Description = "TaylorMind - mapas mentais com IA"; $sc.Save\(\); "atalho criado: " + \(Test-Path "$desktop\\TaylorMind.lnk"\))
